macro.title: Caregiver survey shows widespread burnout, with Gen Z hit hardest
macro.what: Half of Gen Z caregivers said caregiving has damaged personal relationships, exceeding rates reported by millennials (41%) and Gen X (38%).
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

housing.title: The ROAD Act and the 26.4% regulatory cost stack on new homes
housing.what: While Washington waits to see whether the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act becomes law by presidential signature, by inaction, by override, or not at all, homebuilders and developers already know the issue at stake does not wait
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Midwestern markets emerge as hotspots for rental momentum
housing.what: A new report from Cavan Companies adds to a growing body of research identifying the Midwest as a leading region for rental housing returns and rent growth.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.
